---
title: "Package architecture"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Package architecture}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

`similR` separates package code from the institutional database. Package versions follow semantic versioning; data versions use `YYYY.MM`.

Phase 2 prepares the four DuckDB tables `articles`, `embeddings`, `lexical_documents`, and `database_metadata`. Phase 3 will implement the lexical ranker, and Phase 4 will implement the local Python semantic engine.
